title: rubus × cuspidulatus
intro: Rubus × cuspidulatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wineberry, is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Rubus × cuspidulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive well-being, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
